  "findings": [
    "PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run, violating thermal expansion requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the required PVC expansion fitting(s) to accommodate thermal expansion and contraction before final inspection and closeout."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 352.44 requires expansion fittings for PVC conduit where the length change due to temperature variation is expected to be 1/4 inch or greater. Omitting this on a long exterior run subject to temperature swings will cause the conduit to buckle, bend, or pull out of fittings.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 352.44"
  ]
}
